title: Snoek Tartlets
excerpt: Ingredients Crust – You can buy any ready-made pastry! 500 ml flour 5 ml salt 5 ml cayenne pepper 5 ml baking powder 250 ml butter Snoek filling 500 ml smoked snoek, finely flaked 1 onion, finely chopped oil to fry the onion 500 ml cheddar cheese 125 ml finely chopped parsley 250 ml cream 2 …
html:
Ingredients

Crust – You can buy any ready-made pastry!

  • 500 ml flour
  • 5 ml salt
  • 5 ml cayenne pepper
  • 5 ml baking powder
  • 250 ml butter

Snoek filling

  • 500 ml smoked snoek, finely flaked
  • 1 onion, finely chopped
  • oil to fry the onion
  • 500 ml cheddar cheese
  • 125 ml finely chopped parsley
  • 250 ml cream
  • 2 eggs

Method

Crust
Sift the dry ingredients together.

Work the butter in with your fingers. Mix further in a food processor.

Line the tartlet tins and place in the fridge until needed.

Blind bake before use.

Snoek filling

Fry the onion in the pan until glassy.

Place the fried onion in the tartlet shells.

Place the cheese on the onions.

Mix the parsley and snoek and place on top of the cheese.

Beat the cream and eggs and pour over the fish.

Sprinkle more cheese on top and drizzle a little cayenne pepper over.

Bake for 30 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius.

Serve with a salsa and lemon.

Easy!
